title: EODF Bootstrap: update README and docs for post-PR#1 architecture
summary: Update README.md to reflect the dogfood-first architecture after PR #1 merge. Replace outdated prototype-first language, document new CLI commands (status, explain, diff, gate, daemon, create-pr), update architecture diagram to show Protocol-based DI, and remove references to the deprecated codex app-server adapter.
acceptance_criteria: README reflects EODF status instead of prototype-first
All current CLI commands are documented
No references to deprecated codex app-server adapter

context.architecture_notes: PR #1 introduced BuilderAdapter/IssueSource protocols, codex exec adapter, Linear client, daemon, GitHub PR service, and configurable gate policy.
